name: Peking Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef in its own fat or with a little oil until it turns gray.
2. Add rice wine, fish sauce, and scallions to the browned meat. Cook for one minute.
3. Stir in hoisin sauce, bean paste, and cornstarch mixed with water. Cook for an additional minute or two until thickened. Set aside.
4. Cook and drain the Chinese egg noodles as you would any other noodles.
5. Place the cooked noodles on a platter and arrange the bean sprouts over them.
6. Pour the hot meat sauce over the noodles and sprinkle with scallions.
7. Serve hot or cool.
From: Michael Loo
